description: This file defines a function that returns SQL migration scripts for setting up and maintaining MySQL database tables related to documents and extracted text for a project. It manages creation of tables, addition of columns, and creation of views to ensure compatibility with existing code.

methods.name: getMigrationSql()
methods.description: Returns SQL statements for creating and maintaining the 'documents' and 'extracted_text' tables, as well as handling a legacy view 'document_extracted_text'.
